title: trichomanes omphalodes
intro: Trichomanes omphalodes, also known as Button Shield or Button Fern, is a type of small, delicate fern native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trichomanes omphalodes include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
